overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic covered plaza with distinctive yellow geometric lighting, then exiting onto a rain-slicked neon-lit city street at night. The camera follows the character as they navigate through the urban environment, passing by the iconic SOFTSYS building and various digital billboards in Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered plaza with geometric light installations

events.description: NPC in blue jacket runs past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the exit stairs

notable_agents.action: running quickly past the camera through the lobby

entered.detail: tall illuminated wall panels with intricate geometric patterns emitting warm yellow light
wide staircase with red accent lighting on the edges leading upward
large illuminated advertisement sign with text 'RASTI & REPUBLIC' and 'FREE YOUR MIND'
transparent glass doors with green neon frames marking the exit to the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a futuristic indoor plaza dominated by massive yellow geometric light panels. The space features polished concrete floors and a staircase leading up to the exit. An NPC runs past in a hurry as the character approaches the glass doors leading outside.

events.description: exits the covered plaza through glass doors into the open night city street
ambient light shifts from warm yellow interior to cool blue neon exterior lighting

agents.ego_description: ascending the stairs and emerging onto the street, pausing to observe the intersection

notable_agents.action: construction worker in safety vest standing near the street corner

entered.detail: tall building with large red neon signage reading 'SOFTSYS' visible in the distance
high-rise office towers with illuminated windows against the night sky
massive concrete overpass with yellow structural elements spanning above the street
rain-slicked street surface reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building onto a rain-slicked street in a dense futuristic metropolis. The view opens to reveal towering glass buildings, an elevated highway structure, and the distinctive red SOFTSYS neon sign glowing in the distance. A construction worker stands near the corner as vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with digital advertising

events.description: camera passes pedestrian in white jacket while continuing down the sidewalk
approaching underpass tunnel entrance on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and jeans walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying various images and text along the building facade
tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk between the walkway and the street
dark tunnel entrance leading under the building structure with warm yellow interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rain-slicked sidewalk flanked by towering digital billboards on the left and palm trees on the right. The red SOFTSYS sign grows larger as the character approaches it. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights of the city, while vehicles pass by on the adjacent road and other pedestrians share the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, geometrically lit indoor plaza into the rain-drenched neon chaos of a futuristic city street. It begins inside a futuristic plaza dominated by massive yellow light panels and polished concrete, following the character past a rushing NPC toward a set of glass exit doors. As the character steps outside, the scene opens into a dense metropolis where the lighting shifts to a cool, wet palette, revealing towering glass buildings, an elevated highway, and a glowing red SOFTSYS sign in the distance. The camera then tracks along a rain-slicked sidewalk flanked by vibrant digital billboards and palm trees, with the wet pavement reflecting the city's neon glow. Finally, the view pushes forward through the crowd and passing traffic as the red SOFTSYS sign grows larger and more prominent in the frame.
